title: Stream prefixes
description: Finite prefixes of an infinite Boolean stream, bounded at depth 3 along the ones spine.

tokens.label: Always-present token
tokens.description: The distinguished token present in every state.

tokens.label: starts with 0
tokens.description: The observation that the stream begins with 0.

tokens.label: starts with 1
tokens.description: The observation that the stream begins with 1.

tokens.label: starts with 11
tokens.description: The observation that the stream begins with 11.

tokens.label: starts with 111
tokens.description: The observation that the stream begins with 111.
